llm_result.situation: Revenue declined sharply this week with net revenue at 7,200, down 24% from 9,500.
llm_result.key_story: All three revenue signals fired simultaneously: revenue down 24%, new clients down 43%, and gross margin compressed from 52% to 38%.

group_narratives.revenue: The revenue cluster shows a broad-based deterioration across volume, acquisition, and margin.

narratives.rev_decline_major: Net revenue fell to 7,200 from 9,500, a 24% decline.
narratives.new_clients_decline: New paid clients dropped from 14 to 8, down 43%.
narratives.margin_compression: Gross margin fell from 52% to 38%, a 27% compression.
